candidate_lesson: An ICT entry where bars_since_signal exceeds ~10 (signal is hours stale) is anti-edge even with commitment_score=1.0 and Grade A — the sweep liquidity has already been absorbed by the time price returns to the FVG.
testable_rule: if signal_layers_active includes 'SWEEP' and bars_since_signal > 10: apply ICTVeto (or size x0.0); only execute sweep-driven entries when bars_since_signal <= 3
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
